title: What Is Your Job Now, Farhan Thawar | Compile 26
summary: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, discusses how the role of engineers is transforming as AI systems write code. He covers shifting software development lifecycle practices, the movement of bottlenecks in engineering workflows, and the practical differences between prototyping with AI and production deployment.
writeup: Farhan Thawar, head of engineering at Shopify, examines how the engineering role changes as AI systems generate code. The talk covers shifts in software development lifecycle practices and how bottlenecks move through engineering workflows once code generation is automated. It also addresses the practical gap between prototyping with AI and shipping to production.
